title: Astonish Vac Maxx Machine Carpet Shampoo, 1 Litre
features: designed to uses with most major Carpet Cleaning machines
Powerful Cleaning action loosens and lifts away dirt
description: Astonish Vac Maxx Electric Machine Carpet Shampoo 1 Liter Bottle Specially Developed For Machine Use On Carpets. Compatible With Leading Carpet Cleaning Machines. Powerful Cleaning Action Penetrates Deep Into Fibers To Loosen And Remove Stubborn Dirt And Stains While Gently Conditioning The Carpet. The Quick Drying Deep Clean Neutralizes Unpleasant Odors And Leaves A Fresh Scent. Suitable For Wool, Wool Blend And Synthetic Carpets. Super Focused. Deodorizes And Refreshes. Phosphate Free. Made In Britain. Read The Instructions For Use Completely Before Use
